title: Freshly Juiced Croatian Tangerine Juice
description: A fresh and refreshing drink perfect for cold days, featuring tender tangerines and canned tomatoes to add a savory twist.
instructions: Squeeze the freshly harvested tangerines to obtain about 1 cup of juice.
Prepare 2 tablespoons of drained canned tomatoes or 4-6 whole canned tomatoes, depending on preference and availability.
Place the canned tomatoes in a small saucepan over medium heat. Gently warm until hot but not boiling.
Deglaze the pan with a tablespoon of fresh orange juice from the squeezed tangerines to create a simple syrup-like base for the juice.
Pour the warmed tomato mixture into a blender or use the back of a spoon to slowly blend in the deglazed juice and remaining fresh orange juice.
Blend until smooth, adding more warm liquid if necessary to achieve your desired consistency. You may need to add additional fresh orange juice based on the tomatoes' water content.
Strain any large chunks or seeds out with a fine mesh strainer into a glass pitcher for serving.
